mapper.select: SELECT * FROM knowledge_document WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM knowledge_document WHERE category = #{category} AND status = 2 ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE knowledge_document SET chunk_count = #{chunkCount}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM knowledge_document WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY created_at DESC
